concerns.text: T002 creates pyproject.toml but plan.md Project Structure shows requirements.txt. This contradiction makes the task unexecutable - which dependency file format should be created?
T009 and T043 both implement missing_invariant_flags in code/data/validator.py. Duplicate work across Foundational and US4 phases - which task should implement this?

T026 validates 'CORE invariants only (crossing number, braid index)' but spec.md FR-003/SC-008/SC-010 explicitly state core invariants are TABULATED (not computed). Algorithm validation applies only to additional invariants in Phase 2+. Task contradicts spec and is unexecutable.
T019 and T047 both log excluded knots to docs/reproducibility/excluded_knots.md. Duplicate work - which task should perform this logging?
T020 and T048 both document validation scope to docs/reproducibility/validation_scope.md. Duplicate work - which task should perform this documentation?
T026 and T027 both document algorithm validation results to docs/reproducibility/algorithm_validation.md. Duplicate work - should be consolidated into one task.
T040 and T041 both write to docs/reproducibility/hyperbolic_volume_validation.md. Duplicate work - should be consolidated into one task.

T050 documents random seeds (no filename specified) while T058 documents seed verification to docs/reproducibility/seed_verification.md. Inconsistent filenames - should use consistent naming convention.
T001 creates entire project structure with many subdirectories. Too coarse - downstream task_atomizer will split this. Should be split into discrete directory creation tasks.
T055 'Code cleanup and refactoring' is vague - what constitutes 'cleanup'? Needs specific criteria (e.g., 'black --check pass with 0 violations').
T056 references quickstart.md validation but quickstart.md is not in plan.md Project Structure. Missing prerequisite artifact.
T025 'Document measurement precision standards' doesn't specify required content sections or format.
T046 'Generate derivation notes' doesn't specify required content sections (formula citations, transformation logic, etc.) per FR-007.
T049 'Generate timestamped logs' doesn't specify exact filename or format requirements per FR-007.
T060 and T061 document census interpretation and mathematical constraints but don't specify exact filenames. T054 documentation list doesn't include these files.
T071 and T072 (reviewer-driven tasks) don't document which reviewer feedback they address. Should reference incorporated feedback for audit traceability.
